title: Business Intelligence Analyst
description: Zendesk is growing our Ann Arbor analytics team and seeking a Business Intelligence Analyst to build dashboards and reports that drive customer success insights. You'll work with product, sales, and customer success teams to translate business questions into SQL queries, create visualizations, and uncover patterns in how customers use our platform. This role is perfect for someone who loves finding stories in data and loves supporting diverse teams.
responsibilities: Build SQL queries against our product database to answer business questions from stakeholders
Design and maintain Tableau dashboards tracking customer health, engagement, and churn indicators
Partner with product management to analyze feature adoption and identify user segmentation opportunities
Conduct exploratory data analysis on customer feedback and support ticket data to identify trends
Create weekly and monthly reports for executive leadership on key performance metrics
Document data assets and maintain a self-service analytics wiki for internal teams

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Data Science, Computer Science, Statistics, or related field
skills: Python or R for statistical analysis
Ability to learn new tools quickly

benefits: Unlimited PTO and flexible work schedule
Learning budget for training courses and conferences
Snacks, coffee, and a vibrant collaborative workspace
